message:
feat(polyfills): Round 11 - Ed25519, X25519, file descriptors

Crypto additions:
- Ed25519 digital signatures (sign/verify) using Zig stdlib
- X25519 ECDH key exchange for deriving shared secrets
- generateKeyPairSync for ed25519/x25519 key pair generation
- createSign/createVerify/createECDH JS wrappers

File descriptor operations:
- fs.openSync/closeSync for low-level file I/O
- fs.readSync/writeSync with position parameter support
- fs.fstatSync returning Stats object with isFile/isDirectory
- fs.fsyncSync for flushing to disk
- fs.ftruncateSync for file truncation
- Native functions registered on _modules._nativeFs for JS access

All implementations in native Zig using stdlib crypto and POSIX syscalls.
26/26 tests passing.
